title: Oracle
description: Oracle schema from Censys Platform API

accept_version.description: The version declared by the service when it accepts the handshake, if applicable.

connect_flags0.description: The first set of ConnectFlags returned in the Accept packet.

connect_flags1.description: The second set of ConnectFlags returned in the Accept packet.

did_resend.description: Whether the server requested that the scanner resend its initial connection packet.

global_service_options.description: Set of flags that the server returns in the Accept packet.

nsn_service_versions.description: A map from the native Service Negotation service names to the ReleaseVersion (in dotted-decimal format) in that service packet.

nsn_version.description: The version string in the root of the native service negotiation packet, if applicable.

refuse_error.description: The parsed descriptor returned by the server in the Refuse packet; it is empty if the server does not return a Refuse packet. The keys are strings like 'DESCRIPTION.ERROR_STACK.ERROR.CODE

refuse_error_raw.description: The unparsed error received when the initial handshake is refused.

refuse_reason_app.description: The 'AppReason' returned by the server in the RefusePacket, as an 8-bit unsigned hex string.

refuse_reason_sys.description: The 'SysReason' returned by the server in the RefusePacket, as an 8-bit unsigned hex string.

refuse_version.description: The version declared by the service when it refuses the handshake, if applicable.
